name: Soko Seiren Co.,Ltd.
summary: Soko Seiren Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells various synthetic and synthetic woven knitted fabrics. The company is also involved in scouring, dyeing, printing, and processing of various textile products; storage and packaging of woven and knitted fabrics; and transportation and collection of industrial waste. In addition, it manufactures and sells various dyeing and finishing machines; dyeing related equipment; and chemical products, as well as provides cellulosic fibers, knitted and brushed fabrics, and car seats. The company was incorporated in 1914 and is headquartered in Kanazawa, Japan. Soko Seiren Co.,Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Marui Orimono Co., Ltd.
